Nous offrons une expertise technique de: We offer international-level technical expertise with a strong local footing. Our founder has over 18 years of experience in civil engineering, trained to European standards while perfectly mastering the realities of the field in West Africa.

Nous pouvons vous conseiller sur le choi: We can advise you on the choice of land based on your project (area, soil type, accessibility). We are not real estate agents, but our technical expertise will help you avoid unpleasant surprises.
Nous proposons un suivi à distance avec: We offer remote monitoring with regular photo/video reports and videoconferences according to your availability. A dedicated project manager is your single point of contact.
Nous réalisons les études préliminaires: We carry out preliminary studies: technical feasibility, architectural sketch, detailed estimate based on the BPU with breakdown by item. Everything is sent by email for your validation. Lead time: 2 to 4 weeks.
Offrir à chaque client particulier, entr: To offer every individual, corporate, or institutional client a single partner
Oui, absolument. Tout le processus est c: Yes, absolutely. The entire process is designed to be managed remotely: studies, contract, payments, monitoring. Your presence is only desirable for the final handover, and even this step can be done via video.

Yes, absolutely. The entire process is designed to be managed remotely: studies, contract, payments, monitoring. Your presence is only desirable for the final handover, and even this step can be done via videoconference.
Oui, c'est l'un de nos atouts majeurs. N: Yes, it is one of our major assets. Our Energy Division (operational in 2026) integrates a solar installation from the design of your building. A single point of contact, a single contract, an energy-autonomous house.
Oui, c’est même l’un de nos atouts majeu: Yes, it is even one of our major assets. Our Energy Division (launching 2026) allows for the integration of a solar installation right from the design stage of your building. One point of contact, one contract, one energy-autonomous home.
Oui. AIAE SARL dispose d'une assurance r: Yes. AIAE SARL has professional civil liability insurance covering any potential damage related to our activities, and a ten-year guarantee covering the load-bearing structure for 10 years after acceptance. Insurance certificates are available upon request during an appointment.
Oui. AIAE intervient dans 4 secteurs : r: Yes. AIAE operates in 4 sectors: residential (villas, buildings), tertiary (offices, shops, hotels), industrial (warehouses, workshops, factories), and agricultural (poultry farms, integrated farms). Each sector has its own pricing grids.
Oui. En créant un compte gratuit, vous p: Yes. By creating a free account, you can save your simulations, compare them, and return to them later. You will also be able to download a summary PDF (feature currently being deployed).
Oui. Le devis inclut la conception archi: Yes. The quote includes architectural design (plans, sections, elevations) and the necessary technical studies. You receive a complete file upon delivery: execution plans, technical reports, guarantee certificates.
Oui. Le paiement se fait par étapes, au: Yes. Payment is made in stages as the work progresses. The schedule is defined together before starting. You only pay upon progress validation, confirmed by visual proof (photos/videos). Never the full amount in advance.
Yes. Payment is made in installments, as work progresses. The schedule is defined together before the start of the site.
Oui. Le simulateur propose 4 secteurs :: Yes. The simulator offers 4 sectors: residential (villas), tertiary (offices, shops), industrial (warehouses, workshops), and agricultural (farms). Each sector has its own parameters and price grids.
Oui. Notre Division Énergie (opérationne: Yes. Our Energy Division (operational in 2026) offers hybrid solar kits from 3 kWp to 50 kWp for businesses and professional buildings (C&I — Commercial & Industrial). Residential solutions can be integrated as part of a construction project. Each installation includes panels, hybrid inverter, LiFePO4 batteries, complete wiring, and commissioning.
Oui. Nous intervenons sur tout le territ: Yes. We operate throughout the Togolese territory: Greater Lomé, Maritime, Plateaux, Centrale, Kara, and Savanes. A geographic coefficient is applied to reflect the specific logistical costs of each zone.
Yes. We operate throughout the Togolese territory: Greater Lomé, Maritime, Plateaux, Centrale, Kara and Savanes regions. A geographical coefficient is applied depending on the area.
Oui. Nous proposons des forages de 30 à: Yes. We offer boreholes from 30 to 120 meters depending on the depth of the water table in your area. The package includes drilling, casing, submerged pump, control panel, and a 2 m³ water tower. The simulator automatically recommends the appropriate depth for your geographic area.
Oui. Pour une sécurité juridique maximal: Yes. For maximum legal security, the contract can be signed before a Togolese notary. A proxy can act on your behalf if you are not in Togo.
Oui. Virements internationaux vers le co: Yes. International transfers to AIAE SARL's verified bank account. Receipt issued for each payment. Stage payments upon progress validation. Contract signable before a notary for maximum legal security.
Par quel moyen avez vous entendu parler: How did you hear about us? Select.
Par respect pour la confidentialité de n: Out of respect for the confidentiality of our clients, we do not publish photos of our construction sites. We can however provide verifiable references upon request during an appointment.
Out of respect for our clients' confidentiality, we do not publish photos of our sites. We can, however, provide you with verifiable references upon request during a meeting.
Parce que le coût réel dépend de choix d: Because the actual cost depends on material choices, architectural complexity, and market conditions. The range gives you a realistic budgetary framework: the minimum corresponds to economical choices, the maximum to high-end choices within the chosen standing.
Pendant toute la durée du chantier : <st: Throughout the duration of the project: weekly photo and video reports, bi-monthly follow-up video conferences, immediate alerts in case of decisions to be made. Your project manager is reachable by phone and WhatsApp.
